text.title: Build vs Buy Decision Framework Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure applying the trade-off-build-vs-buy methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: assess-differentiation
step.action: Score strategic differentiation (1-5); if ≤2, default to Buy and skip to step 5.

step.name: compute-3y-tco
step.input: Build estimate + vendor pricing + maintenance + infra.
step.action: Build TCO model; compute totals for Build / Buy / Hybrid.

step.name: design-exit-plan
step.action: Document data export format, contract clauses, alternative providers.

step.name: emit-adr
step.action: Compose ADR with chosen + rejected + TCO + exit plan + review trigger.
